title: Crazy Optimized
description: Crazy Optimized is a really great modpack that boosts your fps by 10 times so you can have a smoother gameplay
body:
# Optimize your game with this modpack to get the best fps you can ever get

[How to Install](https://crazyoptimized.framer.wiki/installation-guide)


![Performance difference between Crazy Optimized Modpack and Minecraft vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/054b0afd3796bd6adfe04fd763ef5d645bf96af6.jpeg)

Optimizes your game for better performance
This modpack has been tested on various computers and it gave over x10 more fps than vanilla minecraft because we care about your performance

if you have encoutered any bugs email me at: crazyoptimized@gmail.com
